sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 산업 및 데이터 센터 수요 견인으로 매출 48억 2,500만 달러 기록하며 전년 동기 대비 19% 성장

keyPoints.text: 산업 및 데이터 센터 시장의 수요 회복이 전사 매출 성장을 주도하며 전년 동기 대비 19% 증가를 견인함
장기적인 주당 잉여현금흐름 성장을 목표로 아날로그 및 임베디드 프로세싱 제품에 집중하는 사업 모델을 유지함

riskChanges.text: 거시경제적 불확실성이 여전히 존재하며, 이는 반도체 시장 전반의 수요 회복 속도에 변수로 작용할 수 있음
제조 및 기술 기반의 공급망 통제력을 강화하고 있으나, 글로벌 전자제품 시장의 변동성에 따른 수요 변화 위험이 상존함

businessChanges.text: 매출이 전 분기 대비 9% 증가했으며, 특히 산업, 자동차, 데이터 센터 시장에서의 반도체 콘텐츠 증가가 수요를 뒷받침함

financialHighlights.text: 2026년 1분기 매출 48억 2,500만 달러, 영업이익 18억 800만 달러, 순이익 15억 4,500만 달러를 달성함
총자산 343억 9,300만 달러를 보유하고 있으며, 현금및현금성자산은 35억 4,900만 달러로 안정적인 유동성을 확보함

watchItems.text: 자본 지출 감소에도 불구하고 산업 및 데이터 센터 중심의 매출 성장이 지속되는지 확인이 필요하며, 이는 300mm 생산 효율성 극대화 전략의 성패를 가를 것임

ITEM 2. Management’s discussion and analysis of financial condition and results of operations Overview We design and manufacture semiconductors that we sell to electronics designers and manufacturers all over the world. Technology is the foundation of our company, but ultimately, our objective and the best metric for owners to measure our progress is through the growth of free cash flow per share over the long term. Our strategy to maximize long-term free cash flow per share growth has three elements: 1. A great business model that is focused on analog and embedded processing products and built around four sustainable competitive advantages. The four sustainable competitive advantages are powerful in combination and provide tangible benefits: (a) A strong foundation of manufacturing and technology that provides lower costs and greater control of our supply chain. Overview We design and manufacture semiconductors that we sell to electronics designers and manufacturers all over the world. Technology is the foundation of our company, but ultimately, our objective and the best metric for owners to measure our progress is through the growth of free cash flow per share over the long term. Our strategy to maximize long-term free cash flow per share growth has three elements: 1. A great business model that is focused on analog and embedded processing products and built around four sustainable competitive advantages. The four sustainable competitive advantages are powerful in combination and provide tangible benefits: (a) A strong foundation of manufacturing and technology that provides lower costs and greater control of our supply chain. (b) A broad portfolio of analog and embedded processing products that offers more opportunity per customer and more va

Revenue increased 9% sequentially and 19% from the same quarter a year ago with growth led by industrial and data center. Our cash flow from operations of $7.8 billion for the trailing 12 months again underscored the strength of our business model, the quality of our product portfolio and the benefit of 300mm production. Free cash flow for the same period was $4.4 billion. Over the past 12 months we invested $3.9 billion in R&D and SG&A, invested $4.1 billion in capital expenditures and returned $6.0 billion to shareholders. Macroeconomic factors In first quarter, the overall analog and embedded semiconductor market recovery continued. While uncertainty related to broader macroeconomic dynamics remains, growth of semiconductor content in electronics has continued to drive demand for our products, particularly in the industrial, automotive and data center markets. We believe we are well p

Liquidity and capital resources Our primary source of liquidity is cash flow from operations. Additional sources of liquidity are cash and cash equivalents, short-term investments and access to debt markets. We also have a variable-rate, revolving credit facility. As of March 31, 2026, our credit facility was undrawn, and we had no commercial paper outstanding. Cash flows from operating activities for the first three months of 2026 were $1.52 billion, an increase of $671 million from the year-ago period due to higher net income and non-cash items, as well as lower cash used for working capital. Investing activities for the first three months of 2026 used $47 million compared with $1.25 billion of cash provided in the year-ago period.
